title: acalypha oligodonta
intro: Acalypha oligodonta is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the small-stemmed cup plant or small-stemmed copper leaf. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Acalypha oligodonta is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in herbal preparations such as ointments and tinctures to treat various ailments.
